title: Post-Production & Mastering
intro: High-End Post-Production for Story Clarity and Technical Excellence

sections.heading: Service Introduction
body: We provide premium post-production and mastering services designed to transform raw footage into polished, broadcast- and platform-ready masters. Our workflows ensure story clarity, technical consistency, organized versioning, and precise delivery specifications for brands, broadcasters, and platforms across all content types.

sections.heading: Our Experience in Post-Production & Mastering
body: The Untold Story has extensive experience handling post-production for commercials, documentaries, corporate content, events, and TV productions. Our team combines editorial expertise, technical mastery, and workflow discipline to ensure that every project is delivered with cinematic quality, accuracy, and platform compliance.

sections.heading: What Sets The Untold Story Apart
body: Editorial excellence: Strong narrative shaping and pacing to enhance story clarity and impact.
Technical precision: Color grading, audio mastering, and visual effects delivered to broadcast and platform standards.
Flexible multi-format delivery: Versioning, cutdowns, and accessibility outputs ensure content can be deployed across channels efficiently.
Organized post workflows: Structured asset management and delivery processes keep large-scale projects under control.

sections.heading: Offline Editing, Story Cut & Narrative Structure
body: We shape editorial content to refine pacing, narrative clarity, and message delivery, whether for commercial, documentary, corporate, or event productions. Establishes a strong structure before final finishing.

sections.heading: Online Editing & Finishing
body: Final picture finishing, conform, clean deliverables, and mastering for broadcast and digital standards. Ensures consistent quality across formats and distribution requirements.

sections.heading: Color Correction & Color Grading
body: Technical color correction and creative grading aligned with brand look and story tone. Designed to deliver a premium cinematic finish and maintain visual consistency across all scenes and cameras.

sections.heading: Sound Design, Mixing & Mastering
body: We clean dialogue, layer sound design, integrate music, and master the final audio. Built for clarity, impact, and compliance with platform and broadcast loudness standards.

sections.heading: Audio Cleanup & Restoration
body: Noise reduction, EQ, repair, and stabilization for challenging recordings. Especially useful for documentaries, field productions, and event environments.

sections.heading: Music Direction / Composition Support
body: Guidance on music selection or coordination of original compositions, depending on project requirements. Strengthens emotional tone and pacing without licensing complications.

sections.heading: Motion Graphics & 2D Animation
body: Creation of lower-thirds, titles, transitions, explainers, and branded motion assets. Designed for reuse across content systems and marketing campaigns.

sections.heading: 3D Graphics, CGI & VFX
body: 3D visuals, CGI, compositing, and VFX for commercials, branded films, or complex explainables. Elevates production value and addresses on-set limitations.

sections.heading: AI-Assisted Post & AI-Enhanced Visuals
body: Selective AI-supported workflows for enhancement, cleanup, speed, and creative flexibility. Applied carefully to maintain quality and authenticity.

sections.heading: Versioning, Cutdowns & Multi-Format Delivery
body: Structured variants across durations and aspect ratios, 16:9, 1:1, and 9:16. Built to meet platform requirements, performance campaigns, and stakeholder approvals.

sections.heading: Subtitles, Captions & Accessibility Outputs
body: Subtitles, captions, and accessibility-ready formats as needed for platforms and institutional deliverables. All outputs are formatted to match delivery standards.

sections.heading: Delivery Specs & Asset Management
body: Comprehensive packaging and delivery management for brands, broadcasters, and platforms, including formats, codecs, naming, version control, and approval workflows. Keeps post-production organized at scale.

sections.heading: Why Choose The Untold Story?
body: We turn raw footage into polished, professional masters with precision and consistency. Every project benefits from cinematic editorial shaping, technical excellence, multi-format adaptability, and structured workflows, ensuring your content delivers maximum impact.

sections.heading: Conclusion
body: From editorial shaping to final mastering, The Untold Story provides end-to-end post-production that ensures clarity, quality, and reliability across all content types and platforms.
Let’s elevate your footage into polished, platform-ready content.
Schedule a consultation today and bring your projects to professional post-production standards.
